goal: Produce first measurable YouTube uploads instead of waiting on perfect channel setup.

rules.synthetic_content_disclosure: Use disclosure when content depicts realistic altered/synthetic people, places, events, or voices. Stylized abstract videos should still be transparent in description if AI-generated.

lanes.name: CERBERA Signal Shorts
lanes.audience: AI-curious adults, side-hustle builders, automation learners
lanes.monetization_path: Gumroad lead magnet, automation audit offer, later YouTube Partner Program

lanes.name: Micro Song Lab
lanes.audience: general/family-safe music experiments, not directed primarily at children
lanes.monetization_path: music packs, sound loops, Gumroad bundle

lanes.name: Kids Songs Branch
lanes.status: paused until explicit audience setting, originality checks, and human review gate exist

shorts.title: Your AI System Is Not Broken, It Has No Hands
shorts.hook: Your AI system is not lazy. It just has no hands yet.
shorts.script: Your AI system can think, plan, and analyze. But if it cannot log in, upload, sell, or store results, it is just a clever ghost. CERBERA rule one: every idea needs a hand. OAuth, deploy, upload, measure. No hand, no money.
shorts.visual: Dark sci-fi console, ghost brain turning into robotic hand, purple pulse graph.
shorts.caption: No hand, no money. Build the bridge first.
shorts.description: CERBERA decodes automation systems and turns ideas into executable workflows. First rule: connect the hands.
shorts.cta: Comment HAND if your AI still cannot execute.

shorts.title: The Empty Channel Problem
shorts.hook: A beautiful YouTube channel with zero videos is a museum with locked doors.
shorts.script: Logo? Nice. Banner? Fine. Bio? Polished. But the algorithm cannot eat decoration. It eats uploads, retention, clicks, and repeat signals. CERBERA is switching from channel design to upload tests.
shorts.visual: Empty futuristic museum, locked door opens into Shorts upload pipeline.
shorts.caption: The algorithm eats uploads, not logos.
shorts.description: A channel becomes real only when upload, measure, repeat starts.
shorts.cta: Save this if your channel is still a showroom.

shorts.title: One Video ID Beats 100 Ideas
shorts.hook: One video ID is worth more than 100 perfect ideas.
shorts.script: Plans feel productive. Uploads create evidence. The first CERBERA target is not viral fame. It is a videoId, a timestamp, and analytics after 24 hours. Evidence first, ego later.
shorts.visual: Hundreds of floating sticky notes collapse into one glowing videoId.
shorts.caption: Evidence first. Ego later.
shorts.description: The first target is measurable output: videoId, retention, next experiment.
shorts.cta: Comment VIDEOID if you want the system to execute.

shorts.title: Tiny Robot Wake Up Song
shorts.hook: A tiny robot wakes up and chooses one brave task.
shorts.lyrics: Wake up little spark, tap tap start / One small task with a chrome-bright heart / Beep once, breathe twice, roll into light / Tiny robot, build the night
shorts.style: gentle synth-pop, 90 BPM, warm bells, no copyrighted melody
shorts.visual: Small friendly robot powering on inside a purple cloud workshop.
shorts.caption: One small task. Start.
shorts.description: Original micro-song experiment by CERBERA. Family-safe, not directed primarily at children.

shorts.title: Cloud Factory Chorus
shorts.hook: A cloud factory sings while machines make ideas real.
shorts.lyrics: Clouds go hum, wheels go round / Ideas fall like silver sound / Click, connect, upload, fly / Build a ladder through the sky
shorts.style: playful electronic loop, 100 BPM, clean percussion, original melody
shorts.visual: Cloud factory conveyor belt turning lightbulbs into tiny rockets.
shorts.caption: Click. Connect. Upload. Fly.
shorts.description: Original CERBERA micro-song for automation builders and dream mechanics.

success_metrics.first_gate: Any successful private upload returns videoId.

next_system_action: After YouTube OAuth is completed, call /youtube/upload-test with a generated vertical MP4 and metadata from this batch.
